title: Make column color highlight available on API

posts.author: LupApps (Idan Lupo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday.com team,

First off, thank you for the amazing tools you provide—they make organizing workflows so much easier!

Currently, the API and platform allow for conditional formatting to color specific cells or rows, but there’s no option to color an entire column regardless of conditions. Adding this feature would be a fantastic way to improve table organization and enhance visual clarity for users.

Thanks for considering this, and I’d love to hear your thoughts!

Idan

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for the kind words and for the request @LupApps !!

Other users can vote for this here!
